---
title: "Team"
---

## Members
- April Tian — role (data cleaning, EDA, modeling, writing)
- Bryonna Williams — role
- Sage Paz — role
- Sravya Chalamacharla — role

## Collaboration rules (simple)
- Pull before you start work.
- Commit small changes with clear messages.
- Only one person edits the *same* `.qmd` file at a time.
- Use Issues (optional) for tasks/bugs.
